description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix strategy to test on multiple Python versions (3.6, 3.7, 3.8, 3.9) and operating systems (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest). For each job, check out the code, set up the corresponding Python version, cache pip dependencies, install dependencies with pip, run Tox tests, and upload coverage to Codecov.
